findings.description: Attribute table property names are missing from s2 hints: domain, cssClass, nameAlias, elementLabelPattern, dataFrom, comment, initialValueDesc. The hints checklist requires property names from tables (first column) to be included.
findings.source_evidence: 属性値一覧の名称列に domain, cssClass, nameAlias, elementLabelPattern, dataFrom, comment, initialValueDesc が記載されている
